cubes.name: annual_demand
cubes.title: Annual Demand
cubes.description: Annual electricity demand by balancing authority and calendar year (UTC), PUDL-imputed basis, aggregated from the hourly mart. Growth metrics are defined over complete calendar years only.

measures.name: annual_demand.annual_total_demand_mwh
measures.title: Annual Demand Annual Total Demand Mwh
measures.description: Total annual demand (MWh). Equals total_demand at year grain.

measures.name: annual_demand.demand_yoy_growth
measures.title: Annual Demand Demand Yoy Growth
measures.description: Year-over-year demand growth: this year's total over last year's total, minus 1. Defined only where both years are complete; null otherwise (partial-year guard). Governed metric demand_yoy_growth. Aggregating several years returns growth of the summed totals.

measures.name: annual_demand.demand_cagr
measures.title: Annual Demand Demand Cagr
measures.description: Compound annual growth rate of total demand between the first and last complete years in the selection. Governed metric demand_cagr. Valid per balancing authority: group or filter by ba_code; a multi-BA selection without ba_code grouping is not meaningful. Null when the selection spans fewer than two complete years.

dimensions.name: annual_demand.ba_code
dimensions.title: Annual Demand Ba Code
dimensions.description: Balancing authority code (PJM, ERCO, CISO).

dimensions.name: annual_demand.year
dimensions.title: Annual Demand Year
dimensions.description: Calendar year (UTC hours).

dimensions.name: annual_demand.is_complete_year
dimensions.title: Annual Demand Is Complete Year
dimensions.description: True when every expected hour of the calendar year is present. Growth metrics return values for complete years only.

cubes.name: hourly_demand
cubes.title: Hourly Demand
cubes.description: Hourly electricity demand by balancing authority, 2019-01-01 onward, PUDL-imputed basis. Grain: ba_code x datetime_utc (UTC hour).

measures.name: hourly_demand.total_demand_mwh
measures.title: Hourly Demand Total Demand Mwh
measures.description: Total demand (MWh) over the selected period. Governed metric total_demand.

measures.name: hourly_demand.peak_demand_mwh
measures.title: Hourly Demand Peak Demand Mwh
measures.description: Maximum hourly demand (MWh) in the selected period. Governed metric peak_demand. Hourly-average basis, not instantaneous.

measures.name: hourly_demand.average_demand_mwh
measures.title: Hourly Demand Average Demand Mwh
measures.description: Mean hourly demand (MWh) over the selected period. Governed metric average_demand.

measures.name: hourly_demand.hours
measures.title: Hourly Demand Hours
measures.description: Number of BA-hours in the selection.

measures.name: hourly_demand.imputed_hours
measures.title: Hourly Demand Imputed Hours
measures.description: Number of BA-hours with PUDL-imputed demand in the selection.

measures.name: hourly_demand.imputed_demand_share
measures.title: Hourly Demand Imputed Demand Share
measures.description: Share of hours in the selection whose demand value is imputed. Governed metric imputed_demand_share.

dimensions.name: hourly_demand.ba_code
dimensions.title: Hourly Demand Ba Code
dimensions.description: Balancing authority code (PJM, ERCO, CISO).

dimensions.name: hourly_demand.datetime_utc
dimensions.title: Hourly Demand Datetime Utc
dimensions.description: Hour-beginning timestamp, UTC.

dimensions.name: hourly_demand.is_imputed
dimensions.title: Hourly Demand Is Imputed
dimensions.description: True where the demand value was imputed by PUDL rather than reported.

dimensions.name: hourly_demand.imputation_code
dimensions.title: Hourly Demand Imputation Code
dimensions.description: PUDL imputation reason code; null for reported hours.

cubes.name: hourly_generation
cubes.title: Hourly Generation
cubes.description: Hourly net generation by balancing authority and unified fuel category, 2019-01-01 onward, adjusted basis. Grain: ba_code x datetime_utc x unified_fuel_category.

measures.name: hourly_generation.generation_mwh
measures.title: Hourly Generation Generation Mwh
measures.description: Total net generation (MWh, adjusted basis) over the selection. Includes storage categories when they are selected; the mix denominator below excludes them.

measures.name: hourly_generation.denominator_generation_mwh
measures.title: Hourly Generation Denominator Generation Mwh
measures.description: Generation-mix denominator (MWh); excludes storage categories.

measures.name: hourly_generation.renewable_generation_mwh
measures.title: Hourly Generation Renewable Generation Mwh
measures.description: Generation from renewable categories (wind, solar, hydro, geothermal).

measures.name: hourly_generation.fossil_generation_mwh
measures.title: Hourly Generation Fossil Generation Mwh
measures.description: Generation from fossil categories (coal, gas, oil).

measures.name: hourly_generation.carbon_free_generation_mwh
measures.title: Hourly Generation Carbon Free Generation Mwh
measures.description: Generation from carbon-free categories (renewable plus nuclear).

measures.name: hourly_generation.renewable_share
measures.title: Hourly Generation Renewable Share
measures.description: Renewable share of generation. Governed metric renewable_share.

measures.name: hourly_generation.fossil_share
measures.title: Hourly Generation Fossil Share
measures.description: Fossil share of generation. Governed metric fossil_share.

measures.name: hourly_generation.carbon_free_share
measures.title: Hourly Generation Carbon Free Share
measures.description: Carbon-free share of generation. Governed metric carbon_free_share.

measures.name: hourly_generation.imputed_generation_rows_share
measures.title: Hourly Generation Imputed Generation Rows Share
measures.description: Share of generation rows in the selection whose value is EIA-imputed.

measures.name: hourly_generation.coal_share
measures.title: Hourly Generation Coal Share
measures.description: Coal share of generation.

measures.name: hourly_generation.gas_share
measures.title: Hourly Generation Gas Share
measures.description: Natural gas share of generation.

measures.name: hourly_generation.oil_share
measures.title: Hourly Generation Oil Share
measures.description: Petroleum share of generation. Null for ERCO (petroleum absent from its EIA-930 reporting).

measures.name: hourly_generation.nuclear_share
measures.title: Hourly Generation Nuclear Share
measures.description: Nuclear share of generation.

measures.name: hourly_generation.hydro_share
measures.title: Hourly Generation Hydro Share
measures.description: Hydro share of generation (unified across the 2024-07-01 series break).

measures.name: hourly_generation.solar_share
measures.title: Hourly Generation Solar Share
measures.description: Solar share of generation (unified across the 2024-07-01 series break).

measures.name: hourly_generation.wind_share
measures.title: Hourly Generation Wind Share
measures.description: Wind share of generation (unified across the 2024-07-01 series break).

measures.name: hourly_generation.geothermal_share
measures.title: Hourly Generation Geothermal Share
measures.description: Geothermal share of generation. CISO only, first data 2025-12; null elsewhere.

measures.name: hourly_generation.other_share
measures.title: Hourly Generation Other Share
measures.description: Share of generation reported as other (in denominator, no named bucket).

measures.name: hourly_generation.unknown_share
measures.title: Hourly Generation Unknown Share
measures.description: Share of generation reported as unknown (in denominator, no named bucket).

dimensions.name: hourly_generation.ba_code
dimensions.title: Hourly Generation Ba Code
dimensions.description: Balancing authority code (PJM, ERCO, CISO).

dimensions.name: hourly_generation.datetime_utc
dimensions.title: Hourly Generation Datetime Utc
dimensions.description: Hour-beginning timestamp, UTC.

dimensions.name: hourly_generation.unified_fuel_category
dimensions.title: Hourly Generation Unified Fuel Category
dimensions.description: Fuel category unified across the 2024-07-01 EIA-930 recategorization (coal, gas, oil, nuclear, hydro, solar, wind, geothermal, other, unknown, plus storage categories).

dimensions.name: hourly_generation.source_regime
dimensions.title: Hourly Generation Source Regime
dimensions.description: Which EIA-930 labeling regime the row came from (legacy, post_2024_break, both). The truthful series-break signal.

dimensions.name: hourly_generation.in_mix_denominator
dimensions.title: Hourly Generation In Mix Denominator
dimensions.description: True for rows counted in the generation-mix denominator (storage excluded).

dimensions.name: hourly_generation.is_imputed_eia
dimensions.title: Hourly Generation Is Imputed Eia
dimensions.description: True where the generation value was imputed by EIA.

cubes.name: demand
cubes.title: Demand
cubes.description: Governed demand metrics over hourly data (PUDL-imputed basis, 2019 onward, UTC hours). Metrics: total_demand, peak_demand, average_demand, imputed_demand_share.

measures.name: demand.total_demand_mwh
measures.title: Demand Total Demand Mwh
measures.description: Total demand (MWh) over the selected period. Governed metric total_demand.

measures.name: demand.peak_demand_mwh
measures.title: Demand Peak Demand Mwh
measures.description: Maximum hourly demand (MWh) in the selected period. Governed metric peak_demand. Hourly-average basis, not instantaneous.

measures.name: demand.average_demand_mwh
measures.title: Demand Average Demand Mwh
measures.description: Mean hourly demand (MWh) over the selected period. Governed metric average_demand.

measures.name: demand.hours
measures.title: Demand Hours
measures.description: Number of BA-hours in the selection.

measures.name: demand.imputed_hours
measures.title: Demand Imputed Hours
measures.description: Number of BA-hours with PUDL-imputed demand in the selection.

measures.name: demand.imputed_demand_share
measures.title: Demand Imputed Demand Share
measures.description: Share of hours in the selection whose demand value is imputed. Governed metric imputed_demand_share.

dimensions.name: demand.ba_code
dimensions.title: Demand Ba Code
dimensions.description: Balancing authority code (PJM, ERCO, CISO).

dimensions.name: demand.datetime_utc
dimensions.title: Demand Datetime Utc
dimensions.description: Hour-beginning timestamp, UTC.

dimensions.name: demand.is_imputed
dimensions.title: Demand Is Imputed
dimensions.description: True where the demand value was imputed by PUDL rather than reported.

dimensions.name: demand.imputation_code
dimensions.title: Demand Imputation Code
dimensions.description: PUDL imputation reason code; null for reported hours.

cubes.name: demand_growth
cubes.title: Demand Growth
cubes.description: Governed demand growth metrics at BA x calendar-year grain (total-annual basis, complete years only). Metrics: demand_yoy_growth, demand_cagr, annual_total_demand_mwh.

measures.name: demand_growth.annual_total_demand_mwh
measures.title: Demand Growth Annual Total Demand Mwh
measures.description: Total annual demand (MWh). Equals total_demand at year grain.

measures.name: demand_growth.demand_yoy_growth
measures.title: Demand Growth Demand Yoy Growth
measures.description: Year-over-year demand growth: this year's total over last year's total, minus 1. Defined only where both years are complete; null otherwise (partial-year guard). Governed metric demand_yoy_growth. Aggregating several years returns growth of the summed totals.

measures.name: demand_growth.demand_cagr
measures.title: Demand Growth Demand Cagr
measures.description: Compound annual growth rate of total demand between the first and last complete years in the selection. Governed metric demand_cagr. Valid per balancing authority: group or filter by ba_code; a multi-BA selection without ba_code grouping is not meaningful. Null when the selection spans fewer than two complete years.

dimensions.name: demand_growth.ba_code
dimensions.title: Demand Growth Ba Code
dimensions.description: Balancing authority code (PJM, ERCO, CISO).

dimensions.name: demand_growth.year
dimensions.title: Demand Growth Year
dimensions.description: Calendar year (UTC hours).

dimensions.name: demand_growth.is_complete_year
dimensions.title: Demand Growth Is Complete Year
dimensions.description: True when every expected hour of the calendar year is present. Growth metrics return values for complete years only.

cubes.name: generation_mix
cubes.title: Generation Mix
cubes.description: Governed generation and mix metrics over hourly data (adjusted basis, 2019 onward, unified fuel categories). Metrics: generation_by_fuel (generation_mwh grouped by unified_fuel_category), renewable_share, fossil_share, carbon_free_share, and per-fuel mix shares. Storage is excluded from the mix denominator. Null shares mean the BA does not report that fuel.

measures.name: generation_mix.generation_mwh
measures.title: Generation Mix Generation Mwh
measures.description: Total net generation (MWh, adjusted basis) over the selection. Includes storage categories when they are selected; the mix denominator below excludes them.

measures.name: generation_mix.denominator_generation_mwh
measures.title: Generation Mix Denominator Generation Mwh
measures.description: Generation-mix denominator (MWh); excludes storage categories.

measures.name: generation_mix.renewable_generation_mwh
measures.title: Generation Mix Renewable Generation Mwh
measures.description: Generation from renewable categories (wind, solar, hydro, geothermal).

measures.name: generation_mix.fossil_generation_mwh
measures.title: Generation Mix Fossil Generation Mwh
measures.description: Generation from fossil categories (coal, gas, oil).

measures.name: generation_mix.carbon_free_generation_mwh
measures.title: Generation Mix Carbon Free Generation Mwh
measures.description: Generation from carbon-free categories (renewable plus nuclear).

measures.name: generation_mix.renewable_share
measures.title: Generation Mix Renewable Share
measures.description: Renewable share of generation. Governed metric renewable_share.

measures.name: generation_mix.fossil_share
measures.title: Generation Mix Fossil Share
measures.description: Fossil share of generation. Governed metric fossil_share.

measures.name: generation_mix.carbon_free_share
measures.title: Generation Mix Carbon Free Share
measures.description: Carbon-free share of generation. Governed metric carbon_free_share.

measures.name: generation_mix.coal_share
measures.title: Generation Mix Coal Share
measures.description: Coal share of generation.

measures.name: generation_mix.gas_share
measures.title: Generation Mix Gas Share
measures.description: Natural gas share of generation.

measures.name: generation_mix.oil_share
measures.title: Generation Mix Oil Share
measures.description: Petroleum share of generation. Null for ERCO (petroleum absent from its EIA-930 reporting).

measures.name: generation_mix.nuclear_share
measures.title: Generation Mix Nuclear Share
measures.description: Nuclear share of generation.

measures.name: generation_mix.hydro_share
measures.title: Generation Mix Hydro Share
measures.description: Hydro share of generation (unified across the 2024-07-01 series break).

measures.name: generation_mix.solar_share
measures.title: Generation Mix Solar Share
measures.description: Solar share of generation (unified across the 2024-07-01 series break).

measures.name: generation_mix.wind_share
measures.title: Generation Mix Wind Share
measures.description: Wind share of generation (unified across the 2024-07-01 series break).

measures.name: generation_mix.geothermal_share
measures.title: Generation Mix Geothermal Share
measures.description: Geothermal share of generation. CISO only, first data 2025-12; null elsewhere.

measures.name: generation_mix.other_share
measures.title: Generation Mix Other Share
measures.description: Share of generation reported as other (in denominator, no named bucket).

measures.name: generation_mix.unknown_share
measures.title: Generation Mix Unknown Share
measures.description: Share of generation reported as unknown (in denominator, no named bucket).

measures.name: generation_mix.imputed_generation_rows_share
measures.title: Generation Mix Imputed Generation Rows Share
measures.description: Share of generation rows in the selection whose value is EIA-imputed.

dimensions.name: generation_mix.ba_code
dimensions.title: Generation Mix Ba Code
dimensions.description: Balancing authority code (PJM, ERCO, CISO).

dimensions.name: generation_mix.datetime_utc
dimensions.title: Generation Mix Datetime Utc
dimensions.description: Hour-beginning timestamp, UTC.

dimensions.name: generation_mix.unified_fuel_category
dimensions.title: Generation Mix Unified Fuel Category
dimensions.description: Fuel category unified across the 2024-07-01 EIA-930 recategorization (coal, gas, oil, nuclear, hydro, solar, wind, geothermal, other, unknown, plus storage categories).

dimensions.name: generation_mix.source_regime
dimensions.title: Generation Mix Source Regime
dimensions.description: Which EIA-930 labeling regime the row came from (legacy, post_2024_break, both). The truthful series-break signal.

dimensions.name: generation_mix.in_mix_denominator
dimensions.title: Generation Mix In Mix Denominator
dimensions.description: True for rows counted in the generation-mix denominator (storage excluded).

dimensions.name: generation_mix.is_imputed_eia
dimensions.title: Generation Mix Is Imputed Eia
dimensions.description: True where the generation value was imputed by EIA.
